docket_entries.description: TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS FROM SMALL CLAIMS DEPARTMENT)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR APR-06-2017 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAGE, BREEZIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ-CERRA, MODESTO $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.00, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,500.00 IF DEFENDANT SIGNS OVER TITLE TO THE PLAINTIFF OF THE 1990 FORD MUSTANG 5.0, LICENCE PLATE #7DOY708 VIN#1FACP44E42F207245 ON OR BEFORE MARCH 30, 2017. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT MARTINEZ-CERRA, MODESTO MAILED TO PLAINTIFF SAGE, BREEZIE
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.0 - SERVED JAN-23-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ-CERRA, MODESTO
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF APR-06-2017 - STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED. JUDGE PRO TEM ELLIOT L. MYLES, CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA, NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT SAGE, BREEZIE TAKE NOTHING FROM APPELLANT MARTINEZ-CERRA, MODESTO EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS OF THE ACTION. PLEASE SEE ALL STIPULATED TERMS AS OUTLINED IN THE STIPULATED JUDGMENT. SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (NO EXHIBITS TRANSFER TO SMALL CLAIMS DEPARTMENT)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-08-2017 - JUDGMENT.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: MORGAN, KATHLEEN L. SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR MARTINEZ-CERRA, MODESTO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SAGE, BREEZIE AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ-CERRA, MODESTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-08-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-08-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-08-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF BREEZIE SAGE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MODESTO MARTINEZ-CERRA IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
